description.en: Mint a new NFT or SFT within an existing MultiversX collection. You must own the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role for the collection to use this. Provide the collection identifier, quantity, name, royalties, optional metadata hash, attributes, and a media URI. No EGLD fee required — only gas.
description.de: Minte ein neues NFT oder SFT innerhalb einer bestehenden MultiversX-Kollektion. Du musst die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle für die Kollektion besitzen. Gib die Kollektion-ID, Menge, Name, Royalties, optionalen Metadaten-Hash, Attribute und eine Medien-URI an. Keine EGLD-Gebühr erforderlich — nur Gas.
description.es: Mintea un nuevo NFT o SFT dentro de una colección MultiversX existente. Debes poseer el rol ESDTRoleNFTCreate para la colección. Proporciona el identificador de la colección, cantidad, nombre, regalías, hash de metadatos opcional, atributos y una URI de medio. No requiere tarifa EGLD — solo gas.
description.fr: Minte un nouveau NFT ou SFT dans une collection MultiversX existante. Tu dois posséder le rôle ESDTRoleNFTCreate pour la collection. Fournis l'identifiant de la collection, la quantité, le nom, les redevances, le hash de métadonnées optionnel, les attributs et une URI de média. Pas de frais EGLD requis — seulement du gaz.
description.ro: Mintează un NFT sau SFT nou într-o colecție MultiversX existentă. Trebuie să deții rolul ESDTRoleNFTCreate pentru colecție. Furnizează identificatorul colecției, cantitatea, numele, redevențele, hash-ul de metadate opțional, atributele și o URI media. Nu necesită taxă EGLD — doar gaz.
description.it: Minta un nuovo NFT o SFT all'interno di una collezione MultiversX esistente. Devi possedere il ruolo ESDTRoleNFTCreate per la collezione. Fornisci l'identificatore della collezione, quantità, nome, royalty, hash dei metadati opzionale, attributi e un URI del media. Nessuna commissione EGLD richiesta — solo gas.

description.en: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.
description.de: Der Kollektion-Token-Identifier (z.B. 'MEINNFT-a1b2c3'). Muss eine NFT- oder SFT-Kollektion sein, für die du die Erstellungsrolle besitzt.
description.es: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.
description.fr: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.
description.ro: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.
description.it: The collection token identifier (e.g. 'MYNFT-a1b2c3'). Must be an NFT or SFT collection where you hold the create role.

description.en: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.
description.de: Anzahl der zu mintenden Tokens. 1 für ein einzigartiges NFT, oder mehr für SFTs mit mehreren Kopien.
description.es: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.
description.fr: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.
description.ro: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.
description.it: Number of tokens to mint. Use 1 for a unique NFT, or more for SFTs where multiple copies exist.

description.en: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').
description.de: Der Anzeigename dieses spezifischen NFTs (z.B. 'Mein Seltener Drache #1').
description.es: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').
description.fr: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').
description.ro: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').
description.it: The display name of this specific NFT (e.g. 'My Rare Dragon #1').

description.en: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.
description.de: Creator-Royalty in Basispunkten (0–10000). Z.B. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. 0 für keine Royalties.
description.es: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.
description.fr: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.
description.ro: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.
description.it: Creator royalty in basis points (0–10000). E.g. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. Set to 0 for no royalties.

description.en: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.
description.de: Optionaler Inhalts-Hash (z.B. IPFS-CID) zur Integritätsprüfung von Off-Chain-Metadaten. Leer lassen wenn nicht benötigt.
description.es: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.
description.fr: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.
description.ro: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.
description.it: Optional content hash (e.g. IPFS CID) for off-chain metadata integrity verification. Leave empty if not needed.

description.en: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.
description.de: Benutzerdefinierte NFT-Attribute als Zeichenkette (z.B. 'seltenheit:legendär;kraft:95'). Leer lassen wenn nicht benötigt.
description.es: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.
description.fr: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.
description.ro: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.
description.it: Custom NFT attributes as a string (e.g. 'rarity:legendary;power:95'). Leave empty if not needed.

description.en: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.de: Die URI, die auf das Medien- oder Metadaten-Asset des NFTs verweist (z.B. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' oder 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.es: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.fr: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.ro: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
description.it: The URI pointing to the NFT's media or metadata (e.g. 'https://ipfs.io/ipfs/Qm...' or 'ipfs://Qm...').
